title: Python conformance
summary: Agents writing, reviewing, or testing durable repository Python MUST apply the Python guidance unrolled into the active invocation together with the target repository's configured toolchain.
instructions: Agents writing, reviewing, or testing Python MUST apply the complete unrolled Python guidance included with this policy before completion.
Agents MUST preserve the target repository's declared Python version, formatter, linter, type checker, test runner, packaging conventions, and more specific compatible instructions.
Agents MUST use runtime/repository-checks.json as the verification command authority and MUST NOT invent Python environment or tool commands.
Workflow-local automation under runtime/logs/workflows/<run-id>/scripts/ MAY be throwaway and need not conform to the repository Python guidance unless it is promoted into durable repository code.
Agents MUST NOT reconstruct or separately load formatter-owned appendix rules during ordinary implementation or review unless they are changing formatter configuration or integration.
